sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './VideoSection.css'; const VideoSection = () => { const [videos] = useState([ { id: 1, title: 'Лучшие сцены из аниме 2023', thumbnail: 'https://placehold.co/400x225/ff6b6b/white?text=Аниме+Сцены', duration: '15:32', views: '245K', author: 'AnimeCompilation', uploadDate: '2 дня назад' }, { id: 2, title: 'Обзор манги: Solo Leveling', thumbnail: 'https://placehold.co/400x225/4ecdc4/white?text=Solo+Leveling', duration: '22:18', views: '189K', author: 'MangaReviewer', uploadDate: '5 дней назад' }, { id: 3, title: 'Топ 10 моментов из Berserk', thumbnail: 'https://placehold.co/400x225/45b7d1/white?text=Berserk+Moments', duration: '18:45', views: '312K', author: 'BerserkFan', uploadDate: '1 неделю назад' }, { id: 4, title: 'AMV - Лучшие битвы в аниме', thumbnail: 'https://placehold.co/400x225/96ceb4/white?text=AMV+Battles', duration: '12:30', views: '421K', author: 'AMVCreator', uploadDate: '3 дня назад' } ]); return (
{videos.map(video => (
{video.duration}

{video.title}

{video.author} {video.views}
{video.uploadDate}
))}
); }; export default VideoSection;
